title: Feathers Actions
description: A highly configurable lightweight mod that uses the Feathers mod API. It causes actions like sprinting, jumping, swimming, blocking, attacking, climbing, etc.
body:
This is a server and client side mod that uses the existing Feathers mod for minecraft 1.20.1. It reduces stamina to the following actions:
Climbing
Jumping
Mining
Spriting
Charging weapons (E.g. Bow, Crossbow, Trident)
Rowing a boat
Swimming
Swinging tools
Hitting entities with a tool

There are negative effects when all stamina is exhasted like mining fatigue, slowness, and weakness. 

The regeneration system of the Feathers mod has also been reworked to wait a certain number of ticks, then will regenerate feathers, while depleeting a small amount of the player's hunger.

All editions, costs, and effects are configurable and compatible with the configured mod. 

Let me know of any bugs or issues.
